scripts.dev: npm run build -w @stickman/shared && npm run build -w @stickman/web && npm run start -w @stickman/server
scripts.build: npm run build -w @stickman/shared && npm run build -w @stickman/web && npm run build -w @stickman/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @stickman/shared && npm run typecheck -w @stickman/web && npm run typecheck -w @stickman/server
scripts.start: npm run build -w @stickman/shared && npm run build -w @stickman/web && npm run start -w @stickman/server
